name: @hone/mcp
description: the open AI-Q standard MCP server — judgment-review protocol and deterministic scoring for any MCP-capable agent. Local, stores nothing.

scripts.build: npm --prefix ../sdk/typescript install --no-audit --no-fund --silent && npm --prefix ../sdk/typescript run build && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node -e "require('fs').chmodSync('dist/index.js', 0o755)"

author: Derek Choy
